ground_truth.title: Warrior Princess Diamond Drop Necklace
ground_truth.main_content:
L’atelier Nawbar

Warrior Princess Diamond Drop Necklace

$ 3,665.00

This version of L’atelier’s warrior design features the signature industrial-vibe gold bar, wrapped in yellow and silver toned half rings, and adorned by twinkling diamonds to frame a larger, tear-shaped diamond drop. L’atelier recommends wearing this necklace layered with your other favorite chains.
- 18K gold
- Diamonds, .07 TCW
- Pendant measures 5/16″ x 3/4″
- Adjustable chain measures 15 1/2″ – 16 1/4″ in length

L'atelier Nawbar: Warrior Princess Diamond Drop Necklace- small, Handmade 18K gold (bracelet?) inlaid with 0.18 ct diamond drop and encrusted in 0.07 ct of round white diamonds, quantity
